description:
## Problem

The `changesets/action` in `.github/workflows/publish.yml` creates the "chore: version packages" PR using `GITHUB_TOKEN`. GitHub's security model prevents events generated by `GITHUB_TOKEN` from triggering other workflows. This means when the changeset release PR is opened/updated, none of the 7 required CI checks (build x2, test x2, lint, format, audit) ever start. They show as "Expected — Waiting for status to be reported" forever, blocking merge.

Evidence: PR #91 had 0 check runs and 0 commit statuses on its head commit (b6734d0).

## Root Cause

GitHub Actions docs: "Events triggered by the GITHUB_TOKEN, with the exception of workflow_dispatch and repository_dispatch, will not create a new workflow run."

The publish workflow uses `GITHUB_TOKEN` → changesets/action creates PR → `pull_request` event is swallowed → CI workflows never fire.

## Fix

Update `.github/workflows/publish.yml` to use a dedicated token secret instead of `GITHUB_TOKEN` for the changesets action.

### Changes needed in `publish.yml`:

```yaml
      - name: Version and Publish
        uses: changesets/action@v1
        with:
          publish: pnpm run changeset:publish
          version: pnpm run changeset:version
          commit: 'chore: version packages'
          title: 'chore: version packages'
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CHANGESET_TOKEN }}
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
          NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE: 'true'
          HUSKY: '0'
```

The only change is `secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN` → `secrets.CHANGESET_TOKEN`.

### Prerequisites (manual — Jake must do this):
1. Create a fine-grained PAT at https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens with:
   - Repository access: `bookedsolidtech/helixir`
   - Permissions: `Contents: Read and write`, `Pull requests: Read and write`
2. Add the PAT as a repository secret named `CHANGESET_TOKEN` at Settings → Secrets → Actions

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `publish.yml` uses `secrets.CHANGESET_TOKEN` instead of `secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN` for the changesets action
- [ ] Next changeset release PR triggers all 7 required CI checks
- [ ] No other workflows are affected
title: Fix CI checks never running on changeset release PRs
